message:
Merge PR #2019: feat(doctor): make env-vars check auto-fixable via gt doctor --fix

Enhancement: adds Fix() method to env-vars check so 'gt doctor --fix' can apply
missing/incorrect env vars to tmux sessions in-place, without requiring full
restart. Good test coverage.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2019
Author: athosmartins
